name: find_places
description: Structured local business / point-of-interest lookup near a location (OpenStreetMap). Use for 'X shops/gyms/restaurants near me' — returns names, addresses, hours. NOT for general web search.

query.description: What to look for, e.g. 'gym', 'pharmacy', 'coffee shop'

near.description: Place name to center the search on (geocoded via OSM), e.g. 'Chennai' or 'Indiranagar, Bangalore'. Optional if lat/lon are supplied.

lat.description: Latitude of the search center. Optional alternative to `near`.

lon.description: Longitude of the search center. Optional alternative to `near`.

limit.description: Maximum number of places to return

places.description: List of {name, opening_hours, address, phone, lat, lon}

attribution.description: Required ODbL attribution for OpenStreetMap data

center.description: Resolved {lat, lon} the search was centered on

implementation_notes: Routes to systemu.runtime.web_access.find_places — keyless OSM Nominatim geocode + Overpass POI lookup, ODbL-attributed. Returns named local businesses only (unnamed nodes are dropped). Always surface the `attribution` field when displaying results.
